summary: Skip any `field` that isn't a plain `[A-Za-z0-9_]+` identifier in `ResolveByName`.
reason: SQLite cannot bind JSON path keys; `field` was interpolated directly into a `json_extract` path. Any future caller passing an untrusted field name could inject arbitrary SQL. Invalid fields are now silently skipped, matching the existing 'skip fields whose query errored' behavior.
